title: centaurea praecox
intro: Centaurea praecox, also known as the early knapweed or rough knapweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family with yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Centaurea praecox can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
